title: Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi
tagline: Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kolavalvil Ramar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu 19 km from Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kolavalvil Ramar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu 19 km from Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is mentioned in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Kola Valvill Ramar and his consort Lakshmi as Maragathavalli. A granite wall surrounds the temple, enclosing all the shrines and two bodies of water. There is a four-tiered gopuram, the temple's gateway tower.

topPlaces.name: Palunkanda Nathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Palunkanda Nathar Temple is a Hindu temple in the village of Thiruvaipadi near Thiruppanandal in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Cholapuram
topPlaces.description: Cholapuram is a panchayat town in the Thanjavur district of the state of Tamil Nadu, India.In ancient time, it's called as Bhairavapuram.

topPlaces.name: Bhairavesvarar Temple, Cholapuram
topPlaces.description: Bhairavesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Cholapuram in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vilandakandam
topPlaces.description: Vilandakandam is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kadamangudi
topPlaces.description: Kadamangudi is a village in Thanjavur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, situated along the river Kollidam. It consists of just over 100 families.

topPlaces.name: Veppathur
topPlaces.description: Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).

topPlaces.name: Prananadeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Prananadeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumangalakudi in Thanjavur District of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Prananatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangala Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Suryanar Kovil
topPlaces.description: Suryanar Kovil (also called Suryanar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Hindu Sun-God, Surya, located in the village of Suryanar Koil, nearby Aduthurai, Thanjavur District in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Suriyanar, the Sun and his consorts Ushadevi and Pratyusha Devi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi?
faq.a: Stays in Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palunkanda Nathar Temple, Cholapuram, Bhairavesvarar Temple, Cholapuram, Vilandakandam, Kadamangudi.
